faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about RydCare taxi service
faq.q1: How quickly can I get a ride?
faq.a1: RydCare taxis typically arrive within 5-10 minutes in major cities. You can also schedule rides in advance for guaranteed pickup at your preferred time.
faq.q2: Are your drivers verified and safe?
faq.a2: Yes. All RydCare drivers undergo thorough background verification, license checks, and safety training. We maintain strict safety standards for your peace of mind.
faq.a3: Fares are calculated based on distance traveled, trip duration, and ride type selected. You'll see the estimated fare upfront before booking. No hidden charges or unexpected surge pricing.
faq.q4: Can I book a taxi for multiple days or outstation trips?
faq.a4: Absolutely! We offer multi-day packages for outstation trips, weekend getaways, and extended travel. Choose our Outstation service or contact support for custom packages.
faq.q5: What if I need to cancel my ride?
faq.a5: You can cancel rides through the app anytime. Free cancellation is available up to 5 minutes after booking. Minimal cancellation fees may apply for last-minute cancellations.
faq.q6: Which cities does RydCare operate in?
faq.a6: RydCare currently operates in 25+ major cities across India including Mumbai, Delhi, Bangalore, Chennai, Hyderabad, and more. Check the app for availability in your area. We're expanding rapidly!

footer.tagline: Reliable taxi service at your fingertips, anytime, anywhere.
